title: Tiny Tower Defense
description: Strategy tower-defense game: place 5 tower types, survive 20 waves of enemies, upgrade your defenses.
concept: A complete tower-defense game in one file. Place Dart, Cannon, Frost, Tesla, and Venom towers on a grid to stop 20 escalating waves of soldiers, runners, tanks, and bosses. Earn gold from kills to upgrade towers or sell and rethink your strategy. Boss waves every 5 rounds ramp up the pressure.
features: 5 tower types: Dart (fast), Cannon (AoE splash), Frost (slows), Tesla (chain lightning), Venom (DoT poison)
20 waves of escalating difficulty with 3 enemy types + boss spawns every 5 waves
2-level upgrades for every tower type — plus sell at 50% value
2× speed toggle and full touch/keyboard support (keys 1-5)
localStorage saves your best kill score across sessions

interaction.mouse: Hover over grid to preview tower placement and range
interaction.click: Click tower card then grid to place; click placed tower to upgrade or sell
interaction.touch: Tap tower card then tap grid cell; tap tower to manage it
interaction.keyboard: Keys 1-5 select tower type, Esc deselects
